approve_date.text: ที่สมัครระหว่างวันที่

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as member_name ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position ,(SELECT description FROM sc_mem_m_ucf_group_position WHERE group_position = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.group_position ) AS group_position_desc ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth,'dd/mm/yyyy') date_of_birth ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as agetext ,decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex,'M','ชาย','หญิง') as sex ,nvl(sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount, 0) AS salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , 0 ,3 ) as distic ,sc_mem_m_application_form.remark ,nvl(PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no_ref),'ไม่มี') as ref_memname ,nvl(sc_mem_m_application_form.mobile_number,'ไม่มี') as mobile_number ,sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc
, ( select pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( province_code ,district_code ) from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr where member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AS district_addr
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_application_form ,sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.application_form_no) = trim(sc_mem_m_application_form.application_form_no) and sc_mem_m_ucf_application_type.appl_type_code = sc_mem_m_application_form.appl_type_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type --sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date /*WHERE*/
